metadata.title: lo-siento
metadata.description: AI-generated deck about Lo siento in Spanish

sentences.translation: I am sorry for arriving late.
I am sorry, I cannot go.
Excuse me, can you let me through?
Sorry! I didn't see you.
Excuse me, sir, what time is it?
Excuse the bother.
Excuse me, do you have a pen?
Excuse me, is this your chair?

sentences.original: Lo siento mucho por tu pérdida.
sentences.translation: I am very sorry for your loss.

sentences.original: Lo siento mucho, olvidé tu cumpleaños.
sentences.translation: I am very sorry, I forgot your birthday.

sentences.original: No pasa nada, no te preocupes.
sentences.translation: It's okay, don't worry.
Did I stain you? It's okay!

cards.translation: It is okay / It is fine

sentences.translation: It is okay, we can go tomorrow.

sentences.original: Está bien, no es culpa tuya.
sentences.translation: It is fine, it is not your fault.
A thousand apologies for the delay.

sentences.original: Mil disculpas, se me cayó el vaso.
sentences.translation: A thousand apologies, I dropped the glass.
Forgive me for what I said.
Please, forgive me.
It was not my intention to break it.

sentences.original: Perdón, no fue mi intención molestarte.
sentences.translation: Sorry, it was not my intention to bother you.
